(M6E) Received Preventative/Protective Foot Care CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - received preventative/protective foot care. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
437 M6F M6F_DRESSINGS_FOOT (M6F) Application of Dressings to Foot CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - application of dressings. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
438 M6G M6G_NONE_ABOVE (M6G) None of Above Foot Problems CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - none
